[When the birth takes place in Sutak:a (in lOth month) it should
be considered as normal child birth. If the birth happens in
such normal period, then the native's father is clean (without
sin), and the unclean period (due to birth of child in house)
starts after 'Suta Karma' (cutting of Umbilical cord), because
then only it can be considered that the actual birth took place.
Till the cutting of Umbilical cord takes place it cannot be
considered that the birth took place. When the Umbilical cord
is cut, it should be considered that the birth took place, and
then onwards the unclean period (for the native's father) starts]
There would be several, who would like to accept this
method, but still it should be noted that the emphasise of the
above quote is in determining clean/unclean period to be
observed and not in answering the question 'which is the
correct birth time?'. Any way, this is another possible time
